messages.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi! I recently bought a digital camera from your store, but it doesn’t zoom as far as I was hoping. I use it mainly for bird-watching, so the zoom is really important to me. I’d like to exchange it for a camera with the maximum zoom you have, but I want all the other features to stay the same. Price isn’t an issue, and I’d like to get this sorted out as quickly as possible. Can you help me with this?
